name: Our Interpreter
overview: Lin Xi, a rising star in the translation world, reunites with her ex-boyfriend, tech executive Xiao Yicheng, eight years after their breakup. Forced to work together on a major business deal, old feelings resurface as they confront the past and rediscover their shared dream of serving their country on the global stage.

trailers.title: Our Interpreter | Trailer | Song Qian, Chen Xingxu | CROTON MEDIA English Official
